title: The Sacred Search
author: Gary Thomas
subline: What if it's not who you marry, but why?
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- Two paths converging — one on the left, one on the right, meeting at a single RED dot in the middle. The 'sacred search' is the path, not the destination. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Left path: starts low-left, curves up to center -->
    <path d="M -700 200 Q -400 100 -200 -50 Q -100 -100 0 -160" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- Right path: starts low-right, curves up to center -->
    <path d="M 700 200 Q 400 100 200 -50 Q 100 -100 0 -160" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- The meeting point — RED dot -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-160" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="-160" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Faint dotted extensions (the search continues) -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 5" opacity="0.5">
      <path d="M 0 -160 Q 50 -200 100 -240 Q 200 -280 300 -300"/>
      <path d="M 0 -160 Q -50 -200 -100 -240 Q -200 -280 -300 -300"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Footstep marks (left) -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c">
      <circle cx="-680" cy="200" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="-560" cy="160" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="-440" cy="80" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="-320" cy="-10" r="4"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Footstep marks (right) -->
    <g fill="#4c4c4c">
      <circle cx="680" cy="200" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="560" cy="160" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="440" cy="80" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="320" cy="-10" r="4"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Caption -->
    <text x="0" y="360" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">TWO PATHS, ONE RED DOT</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: Two paths converge from low-left and low-right, each made of faint footsteps and a hairline curve, meeting at a single red dot. The red dot is small but unmistakably the only chromatic element. Two faint dashed lines continue outward — the 'search' is bigger than the meeting. Title 320px mixed case, two lines, weight 300.
